seed_instruction: Critically evaluate the hotel you stayed in during your last vacation.
org_constraint: Include at least one rhetorical question to engage the audience.
new_constraint: Use declarative statements only—no questions allowed.
instruction: Critically evaluate the hotel you stayed in during your last vacation. Include at least one rhetorical question to engage the audience. Use declarative statements only—no questions allowed.
